location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Francisco D'Agostino visited Little St. James Island with Epstein — corroborated by email recounting fun on the island
Epstein emails: "come at 330 9 east 71 please do not be late" — scheduling meeting at NYC townhouse, April 2013
Associate David Stem emails Epstein from Moscow: "Anyone you want me to meet?" — Oct 2012 network coordination
Maxwell phoned victims to schedule massage appointments with underage girls at Epstein's Palm Beach estate
Victim describes abuse by Epstein and Maxwell beginning at age 17 across London, NY, FL and USVI
